$comment: Per-project preview-deploy config. Place at <project>/deploy.config.json or <project>/.magestic-ai/deploy.config.json. This example matches cts (CargoTrackingSystem: .NET backend + Node frontend + Postgres).
$environments_comment: Optional named environments for on-demand UI checks (taskType 'ui_check' and the chat 'UI check' toggle). Each entry maps a name to a base URL; credsPrefix names the env-var prefix for that environment's test account in <project>/.magestic-ai/.env: <prefix>_USERNAME / <prefix>_PASSWORD (role-specific override: <prefix>_<ROLE>_USERNAME / _PASSWORD; generic fallback: UI_CHECK_USERNAME / UI_CHECK_PASSWORD). Passwords never go in this file.
$jenkins_comment: Optional Jenkins deploy section ('Deploy on Jenkins' button on finished tasks). Credentials live in <project>/.magestic-ai/.env: JENKINS_URL, JENKINS_USER, JENKINS_API_TOKEN (+ JENKINS_DEPLOY_JAVA_HOME / JENKINS_DEPLOY_GRADLE_USER_HOME for the gradle library step). This example matches kms (CUBA app + talentsuite library published to Nexus via uploadArchives).
